title: [Deprecated] SouthEastern Class 375 / 377 Pack [MTR4]
description:
Superseded & replaced by: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/southeastern-electrostar-pack

A broad range of SouthEastern Class 375 liveries, complete with Connex-spec interior, for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod
body:
![Included Liveries & Interior Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cda8563d0e105ab4a2fee1878b4f0f8deadb9241.png)


# Superseded and replaced by the [SouthEastern Class 375/376/377 Electrostar Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/southeastern-electrostar-pack)



## SouthEastern Class 377 Pack V1.1

Spicing up Kent until the late 2010s applied to the 375 fleet, now available in pixel form!

Including a Connex South Eastern spec interior, and 5 liveries:

SouthEastern _Dark Blue Doors, Gold Stripe_ (Royal Tunbridge Wells' one-off special livery)

SouthEastern _Light Blue Doors, Dark Blue Stripe_

SouthEastern _Light Blue Doors, No Stripe_

SouthEastern _Yellow Doors, Grey Stripe_

SouthEastern _Yellow Doors, No Stripe_
